infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OutfitRoaster needs camera access to take photos of your outfit.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OutfitRoaster needs photo library access to analyze your outfit photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OutfitRoaster needs to save your roast results to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: OutfitRoaster needs camera access to take photos of your outfit.

plugins.photosPermission: OutfitRoaster needs photo library access to analyze your outfit photos.
Allow OutfitRoaster to save your roast results.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow OutfitRoaster to save roast cards to your photos.
